result.stderr:
ChangelogGenerator 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 igloo15

  -m, --make-config      (Default: false) Makes a changelog file in the current
                         directory

  -c, --config           (Default: changelog.json) Location of the changelog 
                         file

  -t, --test             (Default: false) Used to test the creation of 
                         changelog file

  -n, --next-version     The name of the next version to be released. This 
                         should be used when creating changelog for next 
                         version to be released.

  -r, --repo-location    The location of the repo to generate a changelog from

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.
